data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Secure browser lockdown', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the secure browser functionality is operational. The absence of such evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, as the expected result was to confirm coverage or identify a precise gap.
gaps: No evidence of secure browser lockdown functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
